notes: Service-only suppliers (no/few waybills) where the dashboard debt should be invoice-based, not waybill-based.

Default debt formula = total_effective(waybills) - total_paid(bank). For service suppliers (consulting, transport, rent, communications) this produces a false negative because waybills are ~0 while bank payments are real.

For each tax_id listed below the pipeline overrides total_effective with the real invoice total (status: დადასტურებული + დასადასტურებელი) and recomputes total_debt accordingly. Original waybill total is preserved as waybill_total_effective.
Add a tax_id only after confirming with the owner that the supplier is service-only.

suppliers.reason: სერვის-მომწოდებელი — ზედნადები არ ეწერება (1 waybill, 100 ₾), ფაქტურა-ზე ვალდებულობა (47 invoices, 4940 ₾).
